personality_belief.metaphysical_profile: Used only as cultural flavor, never as a decision rule.
personality_belief.decision_style: practical and constrained by real workflow trade-offs
personality_belief.trust_orientation: needs proof from concrete workflows, not just positioning
personality_belief.self_image: responsible, busy, and careful about adding complexity

economic_profile.purchase_decision_process: tests fit against current workflow before committing

life_goals: stay on top of work without constant catch-up
protect personal bandwidth for caregiving and recovery
fears: paying for another tool that becomes shelfware
making work messier during peak coordination hours
unplanned subscription charges eroding tight cash flow
aspirations: reduce admin drag to reclaim 30+ minutes daily
look more organised and trustworthy to clients and management
protect energy for higher-value field coordination and relationship building
moral_boundaries: will not trade away other people's privacy for convenience
expect transparent data handling aligned with local norms
status_concerns: does not want to appear disorganised in front of clients or team
values being seen as the person who keeps operations running smoothly
trade_offs: prefers slightly longer onboarding if it guarantees long-term stability
accepts manual backups for critical client data despite friction
chooses flat-rate pricing over feature-rich tiers that require upselling

life_story.childhood_background: Grew up in a household that valued practical decisions and financial caution in a singapore smb context.
life_story.education_journey: Completed bachelor level education and learned through a mix of formal training and on-the-job repetition during a mid career operator phase.
life_story.career_path: Moved into field service coordinator work because it rewards reliability and the ability to keep moving parts aligned. Currently maintains a documented workflow but relies on manual tracking to bridge gaps between shifts and client sites.
life_story.family_story: Lives with one roommate in an urban core setting. Shares household logistics and carries a high caregiving load, which fragments evenings and weekends, making uninterrupted planning windows rare.
life_story.current_daily_routine: Weekdays split between site coordination, rapid message triage, and protecting narrow focus blocks. High schedule pressure drives fast decisions, but purchases require manager approval, forcing a batched research rhythm. Commutes and lunch breaks are used for tool evaluation and WhatsApp group consensus checks.
recent_life_events: recently reviewed software spend to cut subscription creep
trying to reduce context-switching during the week
audited client follow-up logs after a near-miss delay
frustrations: too many tools creating siloed context
manual follow-up eating into protected time
family responsibilities making admin work feel disproportionately heavy
variable employment stability requiring cautious financial planning
manager approval gates slowing down quick wins
hidden_needs: wants confidence that a new tool will simplify the week within 7â10 days
needs a safe, low-commitment sandbox to test workflows before sharing real client data
expects clear off-ramps and data export options before adoption

behavior_profile.buying_behavior: waits until value is concrete enough to justify habit change; evaluates in batches rather than impulsively
information_sources: personal comparison notes and spreadsheet audits
social_media_usage: LinkedIn for industry updates and vendor credibility
WhatsApp groups for peer validation and quick troubleshooting
behavior_profile.referral_influence: moderate to high; trusts recommendations from colleagues who manage similar field operations
brand_trust_signals: specific user stories from comparable roles
visible privacy stance and data deletion controls
decision_blockers: uncertain ROI within first two weeks
messy setup requiring IT or manager intervention
trust gap around data handling and third-party integrations
emotional_triggers: feeling more in control of follow-up and client promises
seeing a direct before-and-after workflow comparison
behavior_profile.documentation_discipline: high; maintains manual checklists and calendar alerts as fallbacks
behavior_profile.manager_approval_dependence: high; requires concise summary reports and compliance alignment before signing off

active_pain_points: context scattered across messages and emails
not enough uninterrupted time for deep coordination
family responsibilities making admin feel heavier
subscription creep straining tight budget flexibility
latent_pain_points: mental load from tracking too many loose ends
slow drift between client promises and actual follow-up
anxiety around missing manager-approved standards during handovers
jobs_to_be_done: capture next actions reliably without manual entry
reduce manual follow-up work by automating reminders
avoid dropped tasks through visible, shared tracking
success_metrics: zero missed client calls for 14 consecutive days
reduced evening admin time by 30+ minutes
clean handover to next shift without clarification requests

sensitive_reality_layer.social_risk_profile: does not want to look careless with colleagues' or clients' information; prioritises data hygiene over speed
sensitive_reality_layer.fairness_and_inclusion_profile: expects product language to remain respectful and not assume one type of user or household structure
sensitive_reality_layer.taboo_topic_comfort: low; avoids oversharing personal or family stress in professional contexts
sensitive_reality_layer.political_sensitivity: low; focuses on practical operational outcomes
sensitive_reality_layer.discrimination_awareness: medium; sensitive to assumptions about role seniority or caregiving responsibilities
sensitive_reality_layer.public_expression_risk_aversion: medium; prefers private evaluation channels before endorsing tools publicly
sensitive_reality_layer.identity_labeling_comfort: low; dislikes rigid categorisation in onboarding or marketing flows
response_boundaries: will not share private third-party data without a clear, documented reason
expects granular control over what gets synced or stored
sensitive_reality_layer.public_explanation_preference: plain language with concrete examples; avoids jargon and aspirational fluff

audit_evidence_layer.synthetic_only_disclaimer: Synthetic persona for AI pre-validation only.
